jsonLd.title: Senior Revenue Manager at FabHotels
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Revenue Manager with drive and ambition, FabHotels in Aurangabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About FabHotels:
FabHotels is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in GDS Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FabHotels!
